scripts.predev: lsof -ti:3001,5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'bun --watch src/index.ts' 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: bun run dev:backend & bun run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:portless: bun run dev:portless:backend & bun run dev:portless:frontend
scripts.dev:portless:backend: cd backend && FRONTEND_URL=https://listen.localhost bun --env-file=../.env run dev:portless
scripts.deploy:frontend: bun run build --filter=listen-frontend && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=9959301f03d2db1a5fcf5e004278d467 bunx wrangler pages deploy
scripts.deploy:backend:phala: phala deploy -c docker-compose.phala.yml -n listen-backend --instance-type tdx.small -e .env -e LISTEN_BACKEND_IMAGE=${LISTEN_BACKEND_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/tinycloudlabs/listen-backend:latest} -e FRONTEND_URL=https://listen.tinycloud.xyz -e PORT=3001 --wait
